name: content-summarizer
description: Intelligent content summarization for large text, logs, API responses, and documentation

context_triggers: API response too large to process

instructions: Choose the right strategy: truncation for simple cases, extraction for structured data
Preserve beginning and end context when truncating large content
Extract key lines based on error patterns, warnings, and status indicators
Maintain document structure when summarizing structured content (YAML, JSON, Markdown)
Include a confidence indicator for how much information was retained vs lost
